wins_analysis: No wins today. Zero targets were hit, so there is nothing positive to extract from today's execution.
losses_analysis: The single executed trade hit its stop loss despite a strong trending_up regime (Nifty +3.2%). This suggests the trade was either a counter-trend SHORT, or it was a stale pending order from a previous session that filled into an unfavorable level. The AI was unavailable (zone score fallback mode), meaning entry quality was degraded without proper probability scoring.
regime_impact: Today's strong uptrend (+3.2%, ADX 25) should have heavily favoured BUY-side demand zone trades. The loss suggests the executed trade was likely misaligned with the regime — possibly a SHORT or a BUY at a weak/stale demand zone that had already been swept. The fallback mode without AI clearly hurt performance.

improvements.action: When AI is unavailable (fallback mode), do NOT execute any trades. Set a hard gate: if ai_available == False, skip all order placement and let no pending orders fill.
improvements.reason: Today's only trade was placed via zone score fallback without AI probability filtering, resulting in a -₹1000 loss on a day where the broad market gained 3.2%.

improvements.action: In trending_up regime (ADX >= 22, Nifty change > +1%), block all SHORT-side orders and only allow BUY setups aligned with the trend.
improvements.reason: A 3.2% up day should never produce a loss if only long-side trades are taken. The SL hit implies possible counter-trend positioning.

improvements.action: Cancel all stale pending orders from previous sessions at 9:15 AM before new day scanning begins. No order should carry over more than 1 session.
improvements.reason: With 0 AI recommendations today but 1 execution, the trade likely originated from a prior-day pending order that filled at an outdated level.

improvements.action: Require minimum zone score of 75 (up from current threshold) when operating in fallback mode, and reduce position size by 50% for any fallback-mode trades if the hard gate in priority 1 is not implemented.
improvements.reason: Fallback mode has no AI edge; tighter filters and smaller size limit damage on low-confidence setups.

improvements.action: On strong trending days (Nifty > +2%), use trailing stop or move SL to breakeven after 0.5% move in favor, rather than holding static SL.
improvements.reason: In a 3.2% rally, even mediocre long entries should have been rescued by momentum if SL management was dynamic.

tomorrow_focus: If AI becomes available, focus exclusively on BUY-side demand zone setups in momentum leaders that participated in today's rally; if AI remains unavailable, stay flat entirely.

symbol_notes.UNKNOWN_LOSS: Identify which symbol hit SL today and blacklist it for 2 sessions if it was a SHORT in an uptrend; check if it was a carryover pending order
